servinfo.title: Rear Vehicle Height Sensor Removal and Installation

attention4.ptxt: Headlight auto leveling and washer control module cannot adjust optical axis of headlights properly.
Do not remove bracket and link from rear vehicle height sensor.

attention3.ptxt: After any of the following service, be sure to initialize headlight auto leveling system.

item.ptxt: Replacement of the headlight auto leveling control module.
Replacement of the rear vehicle height sensor.
Removal of the rear vehicle height sensor.

s1.ptxt: Disconnect rear vehicle height sensor connector (1),
Remove rear vehicle height sensor bracket bolts (2) and then remove rear vehicle height sensor (3).

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Tighten rear vehicle height sensor bracket bolts to specified torque in numerical order (“1” – “3”).

torqueitem.t-part: Rear vehicle height sensor bracket bolt*

item.ptxt: Link (1) should be positioned as shown in the figure below when installed.
